title: MoreCarry
description: A lightweight server-side mod that increases item stack sizes with a configurable limit.
body:
# MoreCarry
![99 diamonds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0139213c66909be0fe96e0563059096002509b8c.png)

**_WARNING:_** Since the mod runs exclusively on the server, the mod can't override Minecraft's stack limit of 99 items.

MoreCarry is a lightweight server-side mod that increases maximum stack sizes in Minecraft, allowing you to carry more items in a single inventory slot.

The mod works on the server and requires no client installation.

## Installation

Drop the mod JAR into your server's mods folder with Fabric Loader and Fabric API installed.

## Configuration

Edit config/morecarry.json to customize:
Maximum stack size (default: 99)
Enable/disable the mod
Commands

```
/morecarry info
```
 - View current stack size settings

```
/morecarry reload
```
 - Reload configuration
